description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests 🎳 that runs on push to tags, master, and dev branches, and on pull requests to master and dev branches, but only for QuickOSM/ paths. The workflow has four jobs: flake8, pylint, test-qgis, and release. The flake8 and pylint jobs set up Python 3.10, install requirements, and run linters. The test-qgis job runs tests in a Docker environment. The release job depends on the other jobs, sets up Python 3.10, and creates a release on GitHub with a changelog, packages and deploys the plugin, and sends a tweet and repository dispatch.
